nodes.label: AI alignment with educational standards and rigor
nodes.label_negative: AI use conflicting with academic honesty expectations
nodes.grounding_span: schools are expected to have a level of academic honesty and authenticity above a corporate setting

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings in lesson planning
nodes.grounding_span: if I have a 50 minute class period...just for the AI to make a little lesson schedule and spit it back to me

nodes.label: Pedagogical integrity and student understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I like to build my lessons in a way that reinforces previous lessons

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I write and paint as hobbies...I want to tailor them to my class and my students

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: schools are expected to have a level of academic honesty and authenticity

nodes.label: Frustration with AI formatting
nodes.grounding_span: Having to parse a 5-paragraph response for just the information I want is less useful

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like the way AI writes...it conflates 'simple terms' with 'young audience'

nodes.label: Preference for AI as starting point, not final product
nodes.grounding_span: I never copy and paste from AI and instead try to use it as a jumping-off point

nodes.label: Dissatisfaction with AI pedagogical depth
nodes.grounding_span: no matter what AI gave me, it felt clunky

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do any kind of writing or creative work myself

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing skills
nodes.grounding_span: I fear that these skills will become less desired by employers and by society

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: If an AI chatbot comes out that gives me amazing responses...I will probably use it a lot more

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I often have to go back in forth after that to get a response that's usable for me

nodes.label: Pragmatic simplicity preference — values straightforward input-output processes
nodes.grounding_span: I don't need a bulleted list, I don't need explanations, I don't need a 'helpful tips' section
